What does HTML stand for?: In HTML, what is the term for the rules that dictate how the coding language should be written?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The term for these rules is syntax.

What does HTML stand for?: An HTML _____ is a generic term used to describe anything that can be displayed on a webpage, such as a button or a paragraph.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: element

What does HTML stand for?: What is the function of an HTML tag?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: An HTML tag tells the computer what kind of element you are trying to create.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the syntactical difference between an opening HTML tag and a closing HTML tag?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A closing tag has a forward slash (/) in front of the tag name, while an opening tag does not.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of an HTML attribute?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: An HTML attribute modifies how an element behaves or appears.

What does HTML stand for?: In the HTML tag `<a href="..." target="...">`, what are `href` and `target` known as?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: They are known as attribute names.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the `href` attribute in an anchor `<a>` element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `href` attribute specifies the destination URL that the link points to.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the effect of setting the `target` attribute of a link to `_blank`?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It causes the link to open in a new browser tab.

What does HTML stand for?: How does HTML handle multiple spaces or new lines in the code?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: HTML ignores extra spaces and new lines, rendering them as a single space on the webpage.

What does HTML stand for?: To change the default number of spaces used for indentation in VS Code, you can search for the _____ setting.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: tab size

What does HTML stand for?: What is the function of the `<style>` element in HTML?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<style>` element contains CSS code that modifies the appearance of other HTML elements.

What does HTML stand for?: In a CSS rule like `button { color: red; }`, what is `button` called?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: `button` is called a CSS selector.

What does HTML stand for?: In a CSS rule like `button { color: red; }`, what is `color` called?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: `color` is called a CSS property.

What does HTML stand for?: In a CSS rule like `button { color: red; }`, what is `red` called?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: `red` is called a CSS value.

What does HTML stand for?: What punctuation mark is used to end a CSS style declaration?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A semicolon (;) is used to end a CSS style declaration.

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property is used to change the color of text inside an element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `color` property is used to change the text color.

What does HTML stand for?: How do you remove the default border from an HTML element using CSS?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: You can set the `border` property to `none`.

What does HTML stand for?: The RGB color model creates colors by combining which three primary colors?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: RGB combines Red, Green, and Blue.

What does HTML stand for?: What RGB value represents the color white?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The RGB value `(255, 255, 255)` represents white.

What does HTML stand for?: What RGB value represents the color black?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The RGB value `(0, 0, 0)` represents black.

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property changes the mouse cursor into a hand pointer when hovering over an element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `cursor` property set to `pointer` changes the mouse to a hand.

What does HTML stand for?: In HTML, the _____ attribute is used to label an element so it can be targeted by a specific CSS rule.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: class

What does HTML stand for?: What symbol must precede a class name in a CSS selector to target elements with that class?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A dot (.) must precede the class name in a CSS selector.

What does HTML stand for?: The CSS property for adding space on the outside of an element is called _____.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: margin

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property adds spacing to the right of an element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `margin-right` property adds space to the right.

What does HTML stand for?: What does the `:hover` pseudo-class in CSS allow you to do?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It allows you to apply styles that are active only when the user's mouse is over the element.

What does HTML stand for?: A CSS _____ adds extra styles to an element in a specific situation, such as when it is being hovered over or clicked.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: pseudo-class

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS pseudo-class applies styles when an element is actively being clicked on?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `:active` pseudo-class applies styles upon clicking.

What does HTML stand for?: What does the CSS `opacity` property control?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `opacity` property controls how see-through an element is, with values from 0 (invisible) to 1 (fully visible).

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the CSS `transition` property?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `transition` property allows for a smooth change in an element's style over a specified duration.

What does HTML stand for?: To create a smooth, 0.15-second fade-out effect on hover, you would use the CSS rule `transition: opacity _____s;`.
How can you transition multiple CSS properties at once?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: You can list multiple properties separated by a comma in the `transition` declaration (e.g., `transition: background-color 1s, color 1s;`).

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property is used to add a shadow effect around an element's frame?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `box-shadow` property is used to add a shadow.

What does HTML stand for?: What does the 'A' in the RGBA color format represent?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The 'A' stands for Alpha and represents the opacity of the color.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the Chrome DevTools?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It is a set of web developer tools built into Google Chrome for inspecting and debugging web pages.

What does HTML stand for?: The spacing on the inside of an element, between the content and the border, is controlled by the CSS _____ property.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: padding

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the `vertical-align` property in CSS?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It controls the vertical alignment of an inline or inline-block element relative to its line.

What does HTML stand for?: Which CSS property is used to specify the font for an element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `font-family` property specifies the font.

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property is used to make text bold?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `font-weight` property is used to make text bold (e.g., `font-weight: bold;` or `font-weight: 700;`).

What does HTML stand for?: To center text horizontally within its container, you would use the CSS property `text-align: _____;`.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: center

What does HTML stand for?: What is an HTML entity used for?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: An HTML entity is used to display special characters that might otherwise be misinterpreted as HTML code (e.g., `>` for '>').

What does HTML stand for?: When two CSS rules target the same element, the rule with the more _____ selector takes priority.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: specific

What does HTML stand for?: Between an element selector (`p`) and a class selector (`.video-title`), which has higher specificity in CSS?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The class selector (`.video-title`) has higher specificity.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the most generic HTML text element, which has no default styling and is useful for applying custom styles to a part of a text line?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<span>` element is the most generic text element.

What does HTML stand for?: The first line in every HTML file, `<!DOCTYPE html>`, tells the browser to do what?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It tells the browser to use a modern version of HTML.

What does HTML stand for?: In a standard HTML document structure, the `<body>` element is intended to contain what?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<body>` element contains all the elements that are visible on the page.

What does HTML stand for?: In a standard HTML document structure, where would you place the `<title>` element?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<title>` element, which sets the browser tab text, is placed inside the `<head>` element.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the function of the VS Code extension 'Live Server'?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: Live Server automatically reloads the webpage in the browser whenever the code is changed and saved.

What does HTML stand for?: How do you link an external CSS file to an HTML document?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: You use a `<link>` element within the `<head>` section with `rel="stylesheet"` and an `href` attribute pointing to the CSS file.

What does HTML stand for?: An element that does not require a closing tag, such as `` or ``, is known as a _____ element.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: void

What does HTML stand for?: In an `` tag, what is the purpose of the `src` attribute?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `src` (source) attribute specifies the path to the image file to be displayed.

What does HTML stand for?: What HTML element is used to create a text input box?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<input>` element is used to create a text box, typically with `type="text"`.

What does HTML stand for?: The _____ attribute in an `<input>` element provides a short hint that describes the expected value of an input field.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: placeholder

What does HTML stand for?: What is a characteristic of a block-level element in HTML?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A block-level element takes up the entire width of its container, forcing a new line before and after it.

What does HTML stand for?: What is a characteristic of an inline-block element in HTML?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: An inline-block element only takes up as much width as necessary and can appear on the same line as other elements.

What does HTML stand for?: You can switch an element between block and inline-block behavior using the CSS `_____` property.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: display

What does HTML stand for?: What is the primary purpose of the `<div>` element in HTML?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `<div>` element is a generic container used to group other elements together for styling and layout purposes.

What does HTML stand for?: To create a two-column layout using CSS Grid, you set `display: grid;` on the container and then define the columns using the `_____-_____-_____` property.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: grid-template-columns

What does HTML stand for?: In CSS Grid, what does the `1fr` unit represent?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `1fr` (fractional) unit represents one share of the available space in the grid container.

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property is used to set the space between columns in a CSS Grid layout?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `column-gap` property sets the space between columns.

What does HTML stand for?: What CSS property is used to set the space between rows in a CSS Grid layout?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `row-gap` property sets the space between rows.

What does HTML stand for?: To make an image scale to fit its container, you should set its CSS `width` to _____.
To create a horizontal layout with Flexbox, you set `display: flex;` on the container and `flex-direction: _____;`.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: row

What does HTML stand for?: In Flexbox, what is the effect of setting `flex: 1;` on an item?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It causes the item to grow and take up the available free space within the flex container.

What does HTML stand for?: The Flexbox property `justify-content: _____-_____` distributes items evenly, with the first item at the start and the last item at the end.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: space-between

What does HTML stand for?: Which Flexbox property is used to align items along the vertical axis (in a row layout)?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `align-items` property is used for vertical alignment.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the CSS `position: fixed;` property?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It positions an element relative to the browser window, meaning it stays in the same place even when the page is scrolled.

What does HTML stand for?: What is the purpose of the CSS `position: absolute;` property?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It positions an element relative to its nearest positioned ancestor (an element with a position other than `static`).

What does HTML stand for?: To place an absolutely positioned element inside a relatively positioned container, the container must have the CSS property `position: _____`.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: relative

What does HTML stand for?: What does the `z-index` property control in CSS?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: The `z-index` property controls the stacking order of positioned elements, with higher values appearing in front of lower values.

What does HTML stand for?: In Flexbox, `flex-direction: _____` arranges items vertically, one on top of the other.
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: column

What does HTML stand for?: What is a CSS tooltip?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A tooltip is a small pop-up box that appears when a user hovers over an element, providing additional information.

What does HTML stand for?: What does a media query in CSS, like `@media (max-width: 600px)`, allow you to do?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: It allows you to apply specific CSS rules only when the browser window's width meets a certain condition, enabling responsive design.

What does HTML stand for?: What are semantic elements in HTML, such as `<header>` and `<nav>`?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: They are elements that behave like `<div>`s but provide meaningful names that describe their purpose to browsers and screen readers.

What does HTML stand for?: How do you write a comment in HTML?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A comment in HTML starts with `<!--` and ends with `-->`.

What does HTML stand for?: How do you write a comment in CSS?
HTML stands for Hypertext Markup Languag: A comment in CSS starts with `/*` and ends with `*/`.
